verbGlossary.CATALOGED IN: Individual {target} is formally documented as an entry in the master risk register for ongoing tracking
verbGlossary.CLASSIFIED BY: {source} is assigned to {target} category that groups it by source or nature for structured management
verbGlossary.SIGNALED BY: {source} is preceded by an observable trigger condition that provides early warning of materialization
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED TO: {source} is placed under the accountability of a specific owner responsible for monitoring and response
verbGlossary.MANAGED THROUGH: {source} is addressed by selecting and executing a strategic response type from the standard options
verbGlossary.REDUCES TO: Original {target} is diminished through mitigation to the residual level that remains after response
verbGlossary.VISUALIZED IN: {source} are displayed as positioned points on {target} matrix for priority communication
verbGlossary.AGGREGATED INTO: Individual {target}s from the register are summed to produce the total risk exposure value
verbGlossary.ORGANIZED BY: {source} entries are structured under {target} categories for systematic review and reporting
verbGlossary.INCLUDES: {source} category taxonomy contains the specific {target} type as a named classification instance
verbGlossary.ESCALATES TO: {source} initiates a reassessment that may increase {target} score requiring elevated response
verbGlossary.EXECUTES: {source} owner carries out the planned {target}s assigned to risks under their accountability
verbGlossary.BOUND BY: {source} owner's responsibilities are defined and constrained by the contractual {target} allocation terms
verbGlossary.CONTRIBUTES TO: {source} provides one axis of the combined {target} calculation via the scoring formula
verbGlossary.PLOTTED ON: Calculated risk score determines the position of {target} on the likelihood-impact matrix grid
verbGlossary.DETERMINES: {source} level dictates which response type is appropriate based on threshold rules in {target} plan
verbGlossary.FEEDS: Individual {target} is an input to the aggregate risk exposure value calculation for the project
verbGlossary.JUSTIFIES: {source}of {target}s in red and amber zones provides the basis for contingency reserve sizing
verbGlossary.IMPLEMENTED BY: {source}is operationalized through specific {target}s with owners and dates
verbGlossary.FUNDED BY: {source} response costs are covered by drawing from the project {target} reserve allocation
verbGlossary.BUFFERED BY: {source} response strategy incorporates schedule buffer to absorb potential time impacts from {target}
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source}are defined by the contractual {target} allocation provisions
verbGlossary.YIELDS: Completed {target} produces a residual risk level that is the post-response exposure remaining
verbGlossary.TRACKED BY: {source} completion status is measured by {target} mitigation completion rate metric
verbGlossary.MEASURED BY: {source}'s consumption or realization is quantified by {target} measure over time
verbGlossary.HEDGES: {target} reserve provides financial protection against identified financial risk events materializing
verbGlossary.ABSORBS: Schedule buffer consumes schedule {target} impact by providing float that delays can consume without affecting milestones
verbGlossary.REFLECTED IN: Schedule buffer status is captured by the schedule float erosion metric as buffers are consumed
verbGlossary.RECORDED IN: {source}is documented back into {target} register for ongoing monitoring
verbGlossary.TRANSFERRED THROUGH: Residual {target} is shifted to an insurance carrier via required coverage policies
verbGlossary.SECURED BY: {source} allocation provisions are financially guaranteed through surety bonds that assure performance
verbGlossary.BACKSTOPPED BY: {source} allocation is supported by insurance requirements that provide financial recovery if {target}s materialize
verbGlossary.COMPOUNDS: {source}schedule {target} by adding delay probability to dependent activities
verbGlossary.AMPLIFIES: Geotechnical unknowns increase financial {target} through unforeseen cost impacts from subsurface conditions
verbGlossary.DEGRADES: Labor shortages and productivity variance reduce the quality of construction execution performance
verbGlossary.OVERLAPS WITH: Coordination failures share root causes and consequences with design {target} through information conflicts
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS: Environmental {target}s initiate regulatory and permit risk through compliance violations requiring agency response
